name: coding-discipline
description: Workflow-agnostic guardrails for AI coding agents: spec sync preserves confirmed intent across sessions, while risk-triggered skills enforce design alignment, TDD, root-cause debugging, prioritized review, evidence-before-done, disciplined git, and context hygiene.

interface.shortDescription: Spec sync + risk-triggered discipline for coding agents
interface.longDescription: Keep confirmed goals, boundaries, and acceptance criteria synchronized with the current spec, then apply firm engineering discipline only when the risk justifies it: align ambiguous requirements, test testable behavior first, find root causes, review by priority, verify before claiming done, use disciplined git flow, and avoid stale-context drift. It adds guardrails without taking over planning, subagents, worktrees, or the development workflow.
defaultPrompt: Use coding-discipline to align the design before implementing this feature.
Use systematic-debugging to find the root cause of this problem.
Use code-review and verify-before-done to inspect this change.
